package rulecoverage

func NegativeTimeParseLayoutInLoop() string {
    ruleID := "time_parse_layout_in_loop"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "time.Parse(...) or ParseInLocation(...) observed inside loops with a stable layout."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
